name: Unknown Passenger
occupation: unknown — restored progressively by recovered fragments
occupation_locked_until: first profession fragment recovered (e.g. scrap of medical license, name tag, hand that knows knots)

background.appearance: An ordinary coat, plain trousers, sensible shoes. Nothing in the cut hints at a profession or a city.
marks: a faint indentation on the left ring finger where a ring used to be — the ring is not in any pocket
physical_state: a faint ache behind the left temple, baseline

knows: they are on a train called the Train
does_not_know: any reason to believe they were ever anywhere except this train
the destinations on the route map (illegible)

_schema_note: Profile is identity and what the investigator knows about themself. Skill ratings live in stats.json; recovered profession or background triggers a +20 to relevant skills (see coc_skills.md 'background-specific bumps').
